modeDescription: Choose between a standard urlset and a sitemap index.
baseUrlDescription: Used when you want to join relative paths into full URLs.
autoJoinLabel: Join relative paths with the base URL
autoJoinDescription: Turn this off when every row already contains an absolute URL.
presetsDescription: Start from a sensible example, then tune the entries.
urlEntriesDescription: Each row becomes one <url> record in sitemap.xml.
sitemapEntriesDescription: Each row becomes one <sitemap> record in the index.
outputDescription: Copy or download the XML once the sitemap is valid.
outputEmptyDescription: Add at least one URL or sitemap file to generate XML.
invalidBaseUrlMessage: Base URL must be a valid absolute URL when auto join is enabled.
invalidUrlLocationMessage: Row {index} needs an absolute URL or a path that can be joined to the base URL.
invalidSitemapLocationMessage: Sitemap {index} needs an absolute URL or a path that can be joined to the base URL.
invalidPriorityMessage: Row {index} priority must be a number between 0.0 and 1.0.
